name: Silver Ticket - Service Ticket With Anomalous Encryption
description: Detects potential Silver Ticket usage by identifying Kerberos service ticket requests with RC4 encryption where AES is expected, or network logon events with anomalous Kerberos authentication patterns.
query: (event.code: "4769" and winlog.event_data.TicketEncryptionType: "0x17" and winlog.event_data.TicketOptions: "0x40810000" and not winlog.event_data.ServiceName: krbtgt*) or (event.code: "4624" and winlog.event_data.LogonType: "3" and winlog.event_data.AuthenticationPackageName: "Kerberos" and winlog.event_data.KeyLength: "0")
